author: Przemyslaw Cichosz
name: SP8192 Apex Stack Over-Cap Evidence
blurb: Best observed BPB from an SP8192 apex stack with sparse gating, smear gate, LQER, per-group lrzip compression, and score-first phased TTT. This is explicitly not a leaderboard/SOTA claim because the artifact is 415,938 bytes over the 16,000,000 byte cap.
notes: Submitted as over-cap evidence only. A matrix_bits=5 export-only fallback fit at 12,409,190 total bytes but scored val_bpb=1.11462345 without TTT, so it is not the best-BPB result.
